title: 25 Recalling, Tracing, and Amending Wires
body_text:
25	Recalling, Tracing, and Amending Wires
25.1	Overview of Recalling, Tracing, and Amending Wires
You canГўВҖВҷt cancel or amend approved outgoing wires in the Wires application. Approved wires can include future-dated wires and wires that have been sent to the receiving financial institution. You may be able to initiate a trace, recall, or amendment request, as appropriate.
Note:	You can cancel o
utgoing wires that are pending approval (including future-dated wires) in the Wires application. See Section 23.2, Cancelling an Outgoing Wire Pending Approval.
You can initiate a trace, recall, or amendment request for approved outgoing wires as follows:
Important
:	Wire recalls, amendments, and trace requests are processed on a best-efforts basis and arenГўВҖВҷt guaranteed. Once a wire has been released by Central 1, the receiving bank must voluntarily agree to return the funds. Central 1 will make every reasonable effort to support your request, however, the receiving institution may decline, delay, or be unable to return the funds.
Trace Request
ГўВҖВ“ Used to determine the status of an outgoing wire (e.g., the beneficiary claims not to have received the funds) or to cancel a fully approved, future-dated wire. See Section 23.3, Cancelling an Approved Future-Dated Outgoing Wire, for more information.
Recall
Request
ГўВҖВ“ Used for an outgoing wire sent in error (e.g., the wire is a duplicate payment, a misdirected payment, an incorrect amount). Recalls are done on a best-efforts basis and arenГўВҖВҷt guaranteed. Once a wire has been released by Central 1, the receiving bank must voluntarily agree to return the funds. Central 1 will make every reasonable effort to support your request, however, the receiving institution may decline, delay, or be unable to return the funds. Some foreign jurisdictions donГўВҖВҷt return funds once they are deposited. If the recall is successful, the funds are returned to your financial institution ГўВҖВ” less fees ГўВҖВ” and are subject to foreign exchange gains or losses. For wires recalled from financial institutions that donГўВҖВҷt participate in Wires, the FX rate effective the date of recall is used. A fee may be charged whether or not the recall is successful.
Amendment Request
ГўВҖВ“ Used for an outgoing wire that was sent with incomplete or incorrect information. Amendments are used to update the details of an outgoing wire, not to request the return of funds. The amendment request wonГўВҖВҷt be processed if the receiving financial institution has a policy not to accept amendments or has already returned the wire. Amendments are done on a best-efforts basis and arenГўВҖВҷt guaranteed. Amendment requests are subject to fees.
Trace, recall, and amendment requests are subject to fees. Additional fees may be levied by the financial institutions that process the wire and are passed through to your financial institution. Contact your provincial central credit union for details. Class A credit unions in BC and Ontario can refer to the Payment Services Class A Fee Schedule, Form 2725. All other clients, contact your Account Executive.
Related Information
Payment Services Class A Fee Schedule,
Form 2725
(available to Class A credit unions in BC and Ontario)
25.2	Initiating Trace Requests, Recalls, and Amendments for Outgoing Wires
Recalls, amendments, and trace requests (including requests to cancel approved future-dated wires) are submitted via ServiceNow.
A wire may be recalled (or returned) for various reasons including, but not limited to, the following:
ГўВҖВў	Beneficiary Account Number Mismatch
ГўВҖВў	Beneficiary Account Number Incorrect
ГўВҖВў	Beneficiary Account Number Missing
ГўВҖВў	Beneficiary Account Closed
ГўВҖВў	Beneficiary Deceased
ГўВҖВў	Beneficiary Name Incorrect
ГўВҖВў	Beneficiary Name Missing
ГўВҖВў	Correspondent Bank Incorrect
ГўВҖВў	Financial Institution Incorrect
ГўВҖВў	Intermediary Incorrect
ГўВҖВў	Only Receive CAD Wires
ГўВҖВў	Regulatory Concern
ГўВҖВў	Transit Incorrect
Important
:	Wire recalls, amendments, and trace requests are processed on a best-efforts basis and arenГўВҖВҷt guaranteed. Once a wire has been released by Central 1, the receiving bank must voluntarily agree to return the funds. Central 1 will make every reasonable effort to support your request, however, the receiving institution may decline, delay, or be unable to return the funds.
Initiating a Trace, Recall, or Amendment Request to a Financial Institution that Participates in Wires
Cancellation of an approved future-dated wire
ГўВҖВ“
Use ServiceNow to initiate a trace
request. See instructions for:
ГўВҖВңInitiating a Trace, Recall, or Amendment Request to a Financial Institution that DoesnГўВҖВҷt Participate in Wires or to Cancel an Approved Future-Dated WireГўВҖВқ in this section.
Trace, recall, or amendment for a sent wire
ГўВҖВ“ Must be resolved directly between the financial institutions
as follows:
Contact the receiving financial institution directly. Contact information for Canadian credit unions is available from the Canadian Credit Union Association website.
Provide the receiving financial institution with the reason for the trace, recall, or amendment request and the wire details.
ГўВҲВ’
For recall requests, the receiving financial institution will create a return type outgoing wire in Wires if it approves the recall request. When you receive the returned wire, it displays in ГўВҖВңPending IncomingГўВҖВқ.
ГўВҲВ’
For amendment requests, the receiving financial institution will update the wire details if it approves the amendment. If the receiving financial institution doesnГўВҖВҷt approve the amendment request, it will create a return type outgoing wire in Wires. When you receive the returned wire, it displays in ГўВҖВңPending IncomingГўВҖВқ.
Initiating a Trace, Recall, or Amendment Request to a Financial Institution that DoesnГўВҖВҷt Participate in Wires or to Cancel an Approved Future-Dated Wire
Central 1 acts on your behalf. Use ServiceNow to initiate trace, recall, and amendment requests.
Important
:	Wire recalls, amendments, and trace requests are processed on a best-efforts basis and arenГўВҖВҷt guaranteed. Once a wire has been released by Central 1, the receiving bank must voluntarily agree to return the funds. Central 1 will make every reasonable effort to support your request, however, the receiving institution may decline, delay, or be unable to return the funds.
To request a trace, recall, or amendment for an outgoing wire sent to a financial institution that doesnГўВҖВҷt participate in Wires, or to cancel an approved future-dated wire:
Go to
https://clients.central1.com
. Enter your username and password, then select
Sign in
. See Figure 1.
Note: 	YouГўВҖВҷll be prompted to enter your username before this page appears if itГўВҖВҷs your first login to the Client Centre, youГўВҖВҷve deleted your cookies, or youГўВҖВҷre using incognito/private browsing.
Figure 1: Client Centre Login
Select
Applications
. See Figure 2.
Figure 2: Accessing Applications on the Client Centre
Select
Service Now
. See Figure 3.
Note: 	Applications are grouped by type (e.g., Admin & Support, Payments). If needed, scroll down the page to find the application. If youГўВҖВҷve saved the application as a favourite, it will also appear under ГўВҖВңMy FavouritesГўВҖВқ.
Figure 3: Selecting ГўВҖВңServiceNowГўВҖВқ
The ServiceNow main menu displays if youГўВҖВҷre successfully authenticated.
Important
:	Always log off the Client Centre and close the browser when you step away from your desk or when youГўВҖВҷre finished using the system.
Select
Service Catalogue
. See Figure 4.
Figure 4: Select ГўВҖВңService CatalogueГўВҖВқ
Select
Electronic Payments
, then select
Wires Trace, Recall, and Amendment Request
. See Figure 5.
Figure 5: Electronic Payments ГўВҖВ“ Wires Trace, Recall, and Amendment Request
Important
:	Wire recalls, amendments, and trace requests are processed on a best-efforts basis and arenГўВҖВҷt guaranteed. Once a wire has been released by Central 1, the receiving bank must voluntarily agree to return the funds. Central 1 will make every reasonable effort to support your request, however, the receiving institution may decline, delay, or be unable to return the funds.
Complete the Wires Trace, Recall, and Amendment Request page as follows. See Figure 6.
Note:	Fields with an asterisk (*) are required.
ГўВ‘
Select the appropriate contact from the Requested By drop-down menu.
Note:	The Opened By field defaults to your name.
ГўВ‘ВЎ
Select one of the following request types from the Type of Request drop-down menu:
ГўВҲВ’
Trace Request ГўВҖВ“ Central 1 will advise you of the trace results.
ГўВҲВ’
Recall Request ГўВҖВ“ Funds are returned to your financial institution if the wire is successfully recalled, less fees and subject to foreign exchange gains or losses.
ГўВҲВ’
Amendment Request ГўВҖВ“ Central 1 will confirm that it has sent the amendment request and will advise if the request canГўВҖВҷt be processed.
ГўВҲВ’
Compliance Request ГўВҖВ“ Used to request supporting documentation when a wire is held for a compliance review. Wires are processed when the required supporting documentation is provided.
ГўВҲВ’
Fraud Recall Request ГўВҖВ“ Funds are returned to your financial institution if the wire is successfully recalled, less fees and subject to foreign exchange gains or losses.
ГўВ‘Вў
Complete the Wires Details section. The fields in this section are the same regardless of the request type.
Note:	If you are creating a trace request to cancel an approved future-dated wire. Enter ГўВҖВңCancellation for future-dated wireГўВҖВқ in the Reason for Trace or Recall field.
ГўВ‘ВЈ
Enter additional comments as appropriate.
ГўВ‘ВӨ
Select the paperclip icon to attach supporting documents if required.
Select
Submit
. The request is sent to Central 1 and a ServiceNow ticket number is created. Central 1 updates the ticket with the results of the request. For recall requests, Central 1 credits the funds to your financial institutionГўВҖВҷs account if the wire is successfully recalled.
Figure 6: Wires Trace, Recall, and Amendment Request
Initiating a Trace, Recall, or Amendment Request to a Financial Institution that DoesnГўВҖВҷt Participate in Wires ГўВҖВ“ Manually
If ServiceNow is unavailable, you can send a manual trace, recall, or amendment request for an outgoing wire that was sent to a financial institution that doesnГўВҖВҷt participate in Wires.
Important
:	Wire recalls, amendments, and trace requests are processed on a best-efforts basis and arenГўВҖВҷt guaranteed. Once a wire has been released by Central 1, the receiving bank must voluntarily agree to return the funds. Central 1 will make every reasonable effort to support your request, however, the receiving institution may decline, delay, or be unable to return the funds.
To request a trace, recall, or amendment manually:
Complete the Wire Trace, Recall, and Amendment Request, Form 1917. See Figure 7. Completion of the form is self-explanatory.
Figure 7: Wire Trace, Recall, and Amendment Request, Form 1917 ГўВҖВ“ Page 1
Send the form to Central 1 as directed. Central 1 will only accept this form if ServiceNow is unavailable.
ГўВҲВ’
Trace Requests
ГўВҖВ“ Central 1 will advise you of the trace results.
ГўВҲВ’
Recall Requests
ГўВҖВ“ Funds are returned to your financial institution if the wire is successfully recalled, less fees and subject to foreign exchange gains or losses.
ГўВҲВ’
Amendment Requests
ГўВҖВ“ Central 1 will confirm that it has sent the amendment request and will advise if the request canГўВҖВҷt be processed.
ГўВҲВ’
Compliance Request
ГўВҖВ“ Used to request supporting documentation when a wire is held for a compliance review. Wires are processed when the required supporting documentation is provided.
ГўВҲВ’
Fraud Recall Request
ГўВҖВ“ Funds are returned to your financial institution if the wire is successfully recalled, less fees and subject to foreign exchange gains or losses.
Related Information
Wire Trace, Recall, and Amendment Request,
Form 1917
25.3	Receiving Trace Requests for Incoming or Outgoing Wires
Receiving a Trace Request for an Incoming Wire
If a wire is sent between two financial institutions that participate in Wires, the financial institutions must contact each other directly. If a financial institution that doesnГўВҖВҷt participate in Wires initiates a trace request, Central 1 forwards the trace request to the receiving financial institution.
The receiving financial institution must confirm the date that the wire was received and ensure that it was credited to the correct account number.
Receiving a Trace Request for an Outgoing Wire
If you receive a trace request for an outgoing wire, confirm the date that the wire was sent. Ensure that it was sent to the correct account number and financial institution.
25.4	Receiving Recall Requests for Incoming Wires
If a wire is sent between two financial institutions that participate in Wires, the financial institutions must contact each other directly. If a financial institution that doesnГўВҖВҷt participate in Wires initiates a recall request, Central 1 contacts the receiving financial institution.
Important
: 	The financial institution isnГўВҖВҷt obligated to process recall requests.
To process a recall request:
If the beneficiary wasnГўВҖВҷt credited, return the funds as requested. Create a return type wire in Wires. See Section 24.7, Returning Incoming Wires.
If the beneficiary was credited, advise the account holder of the recall request. Obtain authorization from the account holder to debit the account. If you obtain authorization, create a return type wire in the Wires application. See Section 24.7, Returning Incoming Wires.
END
